---
title: "Spiking Neural Networks"
description: "SNNs"
listing:
  contents: "."                # Look inside this current folder for posts
  sort: "date desc"            # Sort chronologically, newest first
  type: table                # Grid or list style options: default, grid, table
  categories: true             # Allow sidebar tag filtering within this project
---

I have two primary goals with this project. First, I want to spend some time learning about the various spiking neural network toolboxes that are available. Second, I want to try doing some basic neuroevolution with them. I really like getting into the low level details of evolutionary algorithms so I would like to do the evolutionary part without toolboxes. But I am also open to using some toolboxes if they seem cool or are tightly integrated with the SNN toolbox.
